Belgium emerges as the model's clear favorite, assigned a 57% chance of victory. New Zealand carries a 16% win probability, leaving the teams roughly 41 percentage points apart in the model's assessment.

The draw carries meaningful probability at 27%, suggesting a competitive match rather than a one-sided affair. Belgium's advantage is substantial but not overwhelming; the model does not project a heavily favored outcome in either regular-time direction. A close, low-scoring contest remains plausible within the forecast range.
